Reconnect with the Earth - Embrace Peace, Joy, and Renewal with Nature Connect!
Get Involved

Inspiring Youth. Growing Futures. Sustaining the Planet.

At the Center for Early Green Education (CEGE), we equip young people with the knowledge, skills, and values needed to become champions of sustainability through nature-based education and creative problem-solving. Discover who we are and how we’re nurturing the next generation of environmental leaders across peri-urban and urban communities...Learn more

Our Core Approach

Nature-Based Education and Environmental Literacy

Capacity building and Innovation

Community Engagement and Advocacy

Why Donate To Us.

Donations play a critical role in making our educational programs and initiatives possible, from environmental workshops to hands-on community projects that build resilience and awareness. Your generosity fuels:

Educational Outreach

Help us develop and deliver impactful environmental education programs that reach students, educators, and families across communities.

Sustainability Projects

Support projects that address issues like climate change, renewable energy, urban agriculture, and biodiversity conservation, equipping young people.

Community Engagement

Enable us to work closely with communities, providing resources and guidance to empower local environmental actions, awareness, and stewardship.

Donate Now

Issues We Champion

We are focused on empowering young people to address pressing environmental challenges in urban and peri-urban communities in these core critical areas. By engaging youth in hands-on education and community projects, we foster a generation equipped to lead sustainable, resilient futures.

Biodiversity Conservation & Restoration

Climate Change Mitigation & Adaptation

Disaster Risk Reduction (DRR) & Resilience

Sustainable Living and Innovation

Renewable Energy Advocacy and Access

Pollution and Waste Management

Urban Agriculture & Food Security

Environmental Health and Wellbeing

Share Our Story - Amplify Our Impact!

By sharing our mission and achievements online, you expand our reach and inspire others to join our cause.

Share Our Posts: Follow and repost our content on our social media pages.

Our Promise
